title: RABA Decision Log Entry
description: Business accountability record for an AI-supported action governed by RABA.

decision_log_id.description: Unique identifier of the business accountability record.

timestamp.description: Time when the decision log entry was created or updated.

workflow_id.description: Workflow or business process where the decision occurred.

agent_id.description: AI agent, model workflow, automation or runtime component involved.

action_boundary.description: Boundary crossed or approached by the action.

previous_state.description: Previous RABA approval state, if available.

risk_level.description: Risk level assigned to the action or transition.

human_owner_role.description: Human role accountable for the workflow or action.

authorizer_id.description: Identifier of the human or system that authorized the action.

policy_reference.description: Policy, rule, threshold or governance condition used.

technical_trace_id.description: Link or identifier for the associated technical trace.

tool_call_id.description: Tool call, function call or MCP tool invocation identifier.

external_system.description: External system affected by the action, if any.

external_reference.description: External record, email, ticket, transaction, document or system reference.

outcome.description: Result of the decision or action.
